steps.description: Click the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" item in the EXPLORER panel of Visual Studio Code to select or open the toolkit folder.
Click the "Close" button (X) on the "Walkthrough: Setup VS Code" tab in Visual Studio Code to close the walkthrough view.
Click the "View Samples" button in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit welcome panel within Visual Studio Code.
Decrease editor zoom level in Visual Studio Code's "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" Samples gallery by pressing Ctrl + - (minus).
Click the "Large Scale Notification Bot" sample card in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit Samples gallery within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Search" input field in the "Samples" tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code.
